title: Extract claims from staged-ingested source (mock spine step)
problem: ticket-143 ingests staged fetch artifacts into sources/chunks. Operators cannot run the next spine step (extract-claims) on that source id with deterministic mock fixtures to prove the Phase 3 discover→fetch→ingest→extract path.
acceptance_criteria: After ingest-staged, extract-claims --source <id> with mock LLM persists validated claims (fixture-backed).
End-to-end unit test covers discover enqueue → fetch artifact (mocked) → ingest-staged → extract-claims.
No live LLM in default pytest collection.
Golden tests remain mock-only and pass.
rollback_plan: Remove staged spine test/fixture; retain ticket-143 ingest-staged.
